headline: CrowdStrike (CRWD) Stock Looks Fully Priced Despite Strong 3 Year Returns
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings has delivered a very large 3 year gain, yet at around US$203.76 per share the stock screens as expensive on Simply Wall St’s valuation checks, which raises the question of how much of the cybersecurity story is already in the price. A roughly 4.5x return over 3 years highlights how strongly the market has rewarded CrowdStrike’s cybersecurity and AI driven positioning. Recent headlines around expanded partnerships, acquisitions and identity security awards can support...
